rulings.Case Title: ST. PAUL MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. POPPI METAXAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT POPPI METAXAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint is sufficient and is not subject to abatement. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ST. PAUL MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. POPPI METAXAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTS 1415 PACHECO, LLC, JERRY METAXAS, and IONIAN VENTURE PARTNERS, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint is sufficient and is not subject to abatement. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL CHIANG VS. MICHAEL ROLLINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Truth Of Matters Admitted As To Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL ROLLINS and HEIDY ROLLINS' Motion For Order Deeming Truth Of Matters Admitted As To Plaintiff GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant to submit evidence documenting costs no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 28, 2017. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL CHIANG VS. MICHAEL ROLLINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL ROLLINS and HEIDY ROLLINS' Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff to provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant to submit evidence documenting costs no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 28, 2017. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: KIMBERLY RHINE GAGOSIAN VS. LYDIA NORMAND RHINE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT LYDIA RHINE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on termination of license (Plaintiff might consider not using form complaint), alleging facts in support of each element of the cause of action, e.g. service and expiration of notice; and explaining the inconsistent allegations re: license agreement vs. referring to the owner as a "landlord." = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: YEE LUNG HONG VS. ISAAC HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH HERNANDEZ and JUAN HERNANDEZ's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: YEE LUNG HONG VS. ISAAC HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH HERNANDEZ and JUAN HERNANDEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS L. VENTURONI ET AL VS. STEVEN MARTIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT STEVEN MARTIN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT DUDUM VS. NEIL SPENCE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Compelling Deft To Provide Written Responses To Form Interoggs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF ROBERT DUDUM's Compelling Defendant To Provide Written Responses To Form Interrogatories GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $510. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts' Responses, Without Objection, To Pltffs' Form Interrogatories-Ud, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Deem Admissions And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 28, 2017 line 7. PLAINTIFF BARBARA BERKELEY's Motion To Compel Defts' Responses, Without Objection, To Pltffs' Form Interrogatories-Ud, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Deem Admissions And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $485. = (501/LOT)
